name: drone-companion
description: ROS 2 node/topic browser, colcon build, deploy, and SSH for the drone's companion computer.

vyuta.companion.agentUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the vyuta-agent companion daemon.

vyuta.companion.sshHost.description: SSH destination for the drone companion computer, e.g. pi@drone.local.

vyuta.companion.workspace.description: colcon workspace directory to build/deploy (defaults to the agent's configured workspace).

vyuta.companion.deployTarget.description: rsync deploy target, e.g. pi@drone.local:/home/pi/ws (defaults to the agent's).
